metadata.description: AI Workflow Skills repository with reusable AI, data, and model workflow agent skills.

plugins.name: grpo-finetune-skills
plugins.description: Skill for running an end-to-end GRPO fine-tuning pipeline with reward functions, training templates, evaluation, and troubleshooting guidance.

plugins.name: mint-lora-training-skills
plugins.description: Skill for running cloud-hosted MinT LoRA fine-tuning workflows with SFT, DPO, GRPO, evaluation, adapter download, and quota checks.
